title: Caller Voices
seoTitle: Game of Darts Caller Voices | BarkinMad Studios
description: Document Game of Darts caller audio assets, caller settings, and voice-control status verified from current source.
summary: The app includes caller audio folders for Daniel and Serena plus settings keys for caller and voice control behavior.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts caller voices image
sourceNotes: Caller folder names were verified from TheGameOfDarts/Sounds/Callers.
VoiceSettingsView is currently development-gated in inspected SettingsView code; release-facing availability is To Verify.

sections.heading: Caller assets
paragraphs: Current source includes caller audio folders named Daniel and Serena. The audio files cover many score callouts including a no-score callout.
The app also stores a `callerEnabled` setting.

sections.heading: Voice controls
paragraphs: App settings include `voiceControlEnabled` and `voiceAutoStart`, and the settings source contains a Voice Settings view for permission handling.
In the inspected SettingsView, Voice Settings are development-gated. Public release availability and detailed behavior remain To Verify.
